testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar for 0 percent
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar for 0 percent

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar with multiplier for decimal 0.5 as 50%
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar with multiplier for decimal 0.5 as 50%

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it clamps progress bar to 100 for values over 100
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it clamps progress bar to 100 for values over 100

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar with label and indigo color
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar with label and indigo color

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it clamps progress bar to 0 for negative values
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it clamps progress bar to 0 for negative values

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar with multiplier for decimal 1.0 as 100%
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar with multiplier for decimal 1.0 as 100%

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it formats a plain percentage value
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it formats a plain percentage value

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar with multiplier clamped to 100%
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar with multiplier clamped to 100%

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it renders text percentage with multiplier for decimal 0.75
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it renders text percentage with multiplier for decimal 0.75

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar for 100 percent
testcase.file: tests/Unit/Formatters/PercentageFormatterTest.php::`PercentageFormatter` → it renders progress bar for 100 percent

testcase.name: `PercentageFormatter` → it returns empty string for null
